content: Just got back from the National Museum of Qatar — absolutely stunning architecture. Highly recommend!
Working on a new branding project for a local startup. Can't wait to share the final result!
Qatar's economy continues to diversify. The new tech sector initiatives are really promising for graduates.
Found the most beautiful hidden beach near Al Wakrah. Crystal clear water and almost no one there!
Tried Damasca One last night — the lamb ouzi is unbelievable. Definitely top 3 in Doha.
Reminder: free health screenings at the West Bay clinic this Saturday 9am–1pm. Spread the word!
Desert camping last weekend was incredible. Stars like you've never seen in the city. 10/10 would go again.
Launched my new app today! It connects local tutors with students across Qatar. Check it out!
Great turnout at today's university debate on climate policy. The future of Qatar's environment is in good hands.
My latest design work just got featured in a regional creative magazine. So grateful for this community!
The new Korean BBQ spot in Lusail is worth every riyal. Pro tip: go on weekdays to avoid the wait.
Sunrise at the Inland Sea (Khor Al Adaid) — no filter needed. Qatar's landscapes never disappoint.
PSA: stay hydrated as temperatures rise! Keep water with you and check on elderly neighbours.
500 users signed up in the first month! Thank you Qatar for the incredible support on this journey.
Qatar Tech Festival next week — who's going? Would love to meet some of you in person!
